name: Bug Flare (Stage 2)
description: The chrysaloid form of the solar bug line. Its carapace glows like molten brass, insulating an internal furnace capable of melting diamond.
originLore: Evolving inside solar cocoon fields, it condenses solar heat into razor-sharp fiery wings and dense obsidian mandibles.

lore.celestialConcordance: Bug Flare Stage 2 maintains the atmospheric density of stellar hive systems, defending nurseries from void space debris.

quantumResonators.name: Incinerating Cutter
quantumResonators.description: Slashes with wings forged of concentrated solar plasma.

quantumResonators.name: Heat Wave
quantumResonators.description: Discharges an expanding ring of intense thermal energy.
